mapper.sql: id, ticket_id, task_type, status, retry_count, next_retry_at, last_error, locked_by, locked_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ticket_knowledge_build_task WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED') AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= #{now}) ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_knowledge_build_task SET status = 'PROCESSING', locked_by = #{lockedBy}, locked_at = #{now}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED') AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= #{now})
UPDATE ticket_knowledge_build_task SET status = 'SUCCESS', last_error = NULL, locked_by = NULL, locked_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE ticket_knowledge_build_task SET status = CASE WHEN #{dead} THEN 'DEAD' ELSE 'FAILED' END, retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, last_error = #{lastError}, locked_by = NULL, locked_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
